verdicts.note: Privacy limits on federal authorities do not answer the rubric's AI-and-big-tech question concerning AI guardrails, data centers, platform accountability, or general data-privacy regulation.

review_notes: All 10 original pairs were reviewed. Rule's federal-data-access position is relevant to immigration enforcement but does not establish an AI or big-tech posture. Broad housing-stability and roadway language does not support additional scores.
